title: AWS Transform Added Model-To-Model Migration Assessment For GenAI Workloads
summary: AWS announced AWS Transform support for model-to-model migration assessment of generative AI workloads, including model mapping to Bedrock equivalents, cost comparisons, prompt-caching analysis, lifecycle awareness, and production-ready code changes.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official source reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Use the assessment output as review input when migrating OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic SDK, LiteLLM, or Ollama workloads toward Bedrock; do not apply generated code changes without normal review.
Compare APW and AWS Transform cost findings before changing multi-provider routing defaults.

detail.change_summary: AWS Transform added generative-AI model migration assessment that can compare current model usage with Bedrock alternatives and surface code, prompt-caching, lifecycle, and cost recommendations.

limitations: APW records the AWS migration-assessment feature as provider-change context; it does not validate generated migrations or AWS cost estimates.
